title: Pit Don't Walk On Death
description: Small mod that prevents you from continuing to move when you die in The Pit. Movement keys must be repressed.
body: # Pit Don't Walk On Death Small mod that prevents you from continuing to move when you die in Hypixel's The Pit. Movement keys must be repressed. This mod is not configurable. This is a mod I made several years ago by request of a random person in a Discord server that I happened to still have a copy of. It will not be seeing any more updates. ## Modpack? If you want to use my mods in a Modpack, I ask that the modpack is only available on Modrinth. Feel free to reach out to me if you would like to discuss further.
